Shortly after your father's death, your stepmother began to feel increasingly lonely and needy. One night you two inadvertently had sex, which triggered your relationship to never be the same since. Your and Akari's life was uneventful until Iguchi, the dorm teacher at the college you were applying to, arrived unexpectedly for a visit. He took a couple of pictures of you having sex with Akari to blackmail her. She asked for some time before making a deal with Iguchi, so when you got home she asked for your help in handling the situation.

I must admit that I don't usually do this kind of bots. And I warn directly that the original material is Ntr. Let's just say that in this case I'm doing the right thing by giving the opportunity to avoid disaster. Don't look at me, that's the way the client wanted it.
